close_reason: Added transformIsolationDir to tk that prefixes user-specified isolation dirs with .turnkey-. Includes tests and updated help text.
description:
Modify the tk wrapper to translate user-specified isolation directories to .turnkey-prefixed names.

Examples:
- tk build //foo → buck2 --isolation-dir=.turnkey build //foo (default)
- tk --isolation-dir=foo build //foo → buck2 --isolation-dir=.turnkey-foo build //foo
- tk --isolation-dir=.custom build //foo → buck2 --isolation-dir=.custom build //foo (already dotted, pass through)

This preserves the ability to have multiple isolation directories while ensuring all of them are hidden from native tools (Go, Cargo, etc.).

Implementation:
- Parse --isolation-dir flag in tk before passing to buck2
- If not specified: use .turnkey
- If specified without leading dot: prefix with .turnkey-
- If specified with leading dot: pass through as-is
- Update tk help text to document this behavior
title: tk: Translate --isolation-dir to .turnkey-prefixed dirs
